_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 2 tumor suppressor protein is expressed in oligodendrocytes and regulates cell proliferation and process formation.

_contextSnippet: the length of these projections was significantly shorter in Merlin overexpressing (26.47 ± 0.81 μm; n > 400) as compared to the control-transfected TC620 cells (41.00 ± 1.18 μm)
details: NF2 overexpression significantly shortened projection length from 41.00±1.18 μm to 26.47±0.81 μm, showing strongest inhibitory effect among cell lines tested
